summary: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get the right of way at every moment, avoiding congestion and increasing throughput.
author: Adam Zewe | MIT News

title: Augmenting citizen science with computer vision for fish monitoring
summary: MIT Sea Grant works with the Woodwell Climate Research Center and other collaborators to demonstrate a deep learning-based system for fish monitoring.
author: Lily Keyes | MIT Sea Grant

title: Wristband enables wearers to control a robotic hand with their own movements
summary: By moving their hands and fingers, users can direct a robot to play piano or shoot a basketball, or they can manipulate objects in a virtual environment.
author: Jennifer Chu | MIT News

title: How to create “humble” AI
summary: An MIT-led team is designing artificial intelligence systems for medical diagnosis that are more collaborative and forthcoming about uncertainty.
author: Anne Trafton | MIT News

title: On algorithms, life, and learning
summary: Operations research expert Dimitris Bertsimas delivered the annual Killian Lecture, providing a look at the past and future of his work.
author: Peter Dizikes | MIT News

title: What’s the right path for AI?
summary: Conference speakers discussed the unfolding trajectory of AI and the benefits of shaping technology to meet people’s needs.

title: MIT and Hasso Plattner Institute establish collaborative hub for AI and creativity
summary: Jointly led by the MIT Morningside Academy for Design, MIT Schwarzman College of Computing, and the Hasso Plattner Institute in Potsdam, the hub will foster a dynamic community where computing, creativity, and human-centered innovation meet.
author: School of Architecture + Planning | MIT Schwarzman College of Computing

title: Generative AI improves a wireless vision system that sees through obstructions
summary: With this new technique, a robot could more accurately detect hidden objects or understand an indoor scene using reflected Wi-Fi signals.

title: A better method for identifying overconfident large language models
summary: This new metric for measuring uncertainty could flag hallucinations and help users know whether to trust an AI model.

title: A better method for planning complex visual tasks
summary: A new hybrid system could help robots navigate in changing environments or increase the efficiency of multirobot assembly teams.
